details.note: Built typed tool results with next affordances. Types, constructors, error classification, affordance resolution, formatting, wrapping helpers, service, and PhaseGate integration.
details.pattern: Effect-based TypedToolResult<T> with schema, wrapExecute, wrapDef, checkPhaseGate

details.note: Wired TypedResult.wrapExecute into built-in tool execution pipeline so all tool results carry typed failure info + suggested next actions.
details.pattern: Imported TypedResult and wrapped item.execute with TypedResult.wrapExecute()
